showcase.title: Kuki Uhitamo Tembera
showcase.subtitle: Umufatanyabikorwa wawe wizewe ku bisubizo bitazibagirana mu Rwanda
showcase.feature1: Ibisubizo by'ahantu byateguwe n'abakorera ingendo bemejwe
showcase.feature2: Urubuga rwo kubita rufite umutekano hamwe n'ubufasha bw'abakiriya 24/7
showcase.feature3: Ibisubizo nyakuri by'u Rwanda ku giciro gihwanye
showcase.whySubtitle: Vumbura u Rwanda nk'uko utigeze ubibona
showcase.reason1Desc: Kora hamwe n'abakorera ingendo beza cyane mu Rwanda bazi ahantu hose h'ihishe
showcase.reason2Desc: Ibisubizo byose byemejwe kandi bisuzumwa n'abagenzi nyakuri
showcase.reason3Desc: Kubita mu buryo butaziguye bivuze nta mafaranga y'abahuza - gusa agaciro gakomeye
showcase.ctaSubtitle: Injira mu bagenzi ibihumbi bavumbura igihugu cy'imisozi igihumbi
